series_metadata.series_description: This file contains railroad safety project files. Each project file will include original communication between the State of Ohio and railroad companies, public agencies and possibly private contractors. File will also contain plans and estimates, letters of agreement and fiscal data, and audit information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper file until file closed by ORDC then scan. Destroy paper after scanning. ; Electronic: Retain electronic documents for 7 years after file closed by ORDC., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
